schema.name: BitSightAlerts_CL
schema.description: The BitSightAlerts table contains alert records from the BitSight API representing changes and news triggers for monitored portfolio companies ingested into Microsoft Sentinel.

columns.name: AlertDate
columns.description: The date the alert was triggered (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: StartDate
columns.description: The start date of the alert (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: CompanyName
columns.description: Name of the company associated with the alert.

columns.name: CompanyGuid
columns.description: GUID of the company associated with the alert.

columns.name: CompanyUrl
columns.description: URL of the company associated with the alert.

columns.name: FolderGuid
columns.description: Folder GUID associated with the alert.

columns.name: FolderName
columns.description: Folder name associated with the alert.

columns.name: ConnectorName
columns.description: Connection name assigned during connector setup.
